headline_variants.text: Embedded Systems Engineer with Software, IoT, and Prototyping Experience
Hands-on Firmware and Product Prototyping Engineer

profile_variants.text: Curious and hands-on embedded systems engineer with experience in firmware, prototyping, electronics debugging, and multidisciplinary development. Enjoy working closely with teams to build useful, reliable products and improve them through testing and iteration.

capability_pool.text: Embedded firmware and MCU development across C, C++, STM32, Nordic nRF, Microchip PIC, and Arduino platforms.
Software application development with Go, C#, Python, Java, Qt, Django, React, TypeScript, and front/back-end APIs.
Hands-on debugging, troubleshooting, electronics repair, calibration tooling, testing, and iterative product improvement.
Industrial and IoT systems using Docker, PLC deployment, InfluxDB, Grafana, TCP/IP, CAN, RS232, SPI, I2C, and BLE.
Electronics design and prototyping including schematics, PCB design, soldering, hardware testing, and custom embedded boards.
Private 5G deployment exposure including SIM provisioning and system performance analysis.
Robotics, mechatronics, CAD, 3D printing, motor control, sensor integration, and autonomous competition systems.
Technical leadership and coordination across multidisciplinary projects, event logistics, partnerships, and contributor teams.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Built calibration tooling and APIs in Go and C++/Qt for industrial PLC deployments.
Designed and deployed a private 5G station, handling SIM provisioning and performance analysis.
Implemented monitoring dashboards in Grafana over InfluxDB time-series data.

experience.title: Repair Technician
bullets: Diagnosed and repaired solar inverters and power electronics through systematic troubleshooting.
Validated repairs on the bench across multiple product generations.

education.title: BSc in Industrial Systems Engineering (Infotronics)
education.thesis: Live track limits crossing detection system for vehicle race using computer vision, AI/ML experimentation

education.title: Federal VET Diploma & Technical Maturity, Electronics
education.thesis: Autonomous robot for Eurobot competition, including mechanical and electronic design and microcontroller programming in C

projects.title: Resume Tailor
projects.subtitle: AI-powered resume customization tool
bullets: Developed a web application that uses AI to analyze job descriptions and tailor resumes for better alignment.
Implemented backend services in Go and frontend interfaces in React and TypeScript.
Integrated multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Perplexity) for resume analysis and customization.
Built a Typst-based PDF generation system for high-quality resume output.

projects.title: Interactive Resume
projects.subtitle: One-page web portfolio showcasing personality with multimedia content
bullets: Built a one-page web resume using TypeScript and React to showcase personality, projects, pictures, and 3D renders—capabilities beyond traditional resumes.
Designed an engaging visual layout that highlights projects with multimedia content including photography and 3D renders.
Created an interactive, responsive portfolio experience that differentiates from standard resume formats.

projects.title: Line Crossing Detection System for Vehicle Race
projects.subtitle: Real-time computer vision system

additional_experience.title: Committee President, Aerodrome Open House Day
Private Pilot License (LAPL) / Flying Club Committee Member
